MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRAIGE, RICHARD COURT TRIAL SET FOR MAY-17-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 08 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE-RICK S. BROWN, REPORTER- CARLITO MANDIA 10:00AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL, ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFT. WILLIAM KOHLER. PLTF. BY GUADALUPE GAMINO PLAINTIFF WITNESS JACK SKINNER SWORN & EXAMINED. EXHIBITS MOVED AND ADMITTED IN EVIDENCE. JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF. TERMS READ INTO RECORD. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT, EXHIBITS W/DRAWN.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOHLER, WILLIAM AKA BILL KOHLER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 419 IVY, #28, SF, CA, 94102 $2,220.39 RENT, $485.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,800.39, LEASE FORFEITED
